input.memoryNote: Every year without fail you still cut my sandwiches in triangles when I visit home. I'm 27. You do it because you know it makes me feel like a kid again. You've never once mentioned it.

meta.tiktokHook: My mom still cuts my sandwiches in triangles. I'm 27. My girlfriend came home with me, got rectangles. She noticed immediately. She said it was the sweetest thing she'd ever seen.
meta.caption: 27 years old and still getting the triangle treatment
meta.whyItWorks: Girlfriend-as-observer gives emotional permission. Mothers will share it. Partners will tag their person. Extremely broad reach.
meta.amplifiedVersion: I brought my girlfriend home for Thanksgiving. You made sandwiches for lunch. Mine was in triangles. Hers was in rectangles. She noticed immediately. In the car home she said: 'your mom cuts your sandwiches differently than everyone else's.' I said I know. She said 'that's actually the sweetest thing I've ever seen.' You've been doing it my whole life and you've still never said a word.
